title: MrBeast Store Shopping Skill
readme: Shop for MrBeast merchandise and accessories on the official MrBeast store.

search.description: Search for products by keyword query.

getProduct.description: Get detailed product info from a product page. You can provide either a handle or a targetUrl (or both).

handle.description: Product URL handle/slug (e.g., 'limited-edition-hoodie'). Provide this or targetUrl.

targetUrl.description: Full URL to the product page. Provide this or handle.

addToCart.description: Add a product to the cart. If called after getProduct (already on product page), handle is optional and only quantity/options are needed. If called standalone, provide handle so the handler can navigate to the product page first.

handle.description: Product handle. REQUIRED if not already on a product page (e.g., after getProduct was NOT called). Optional if already on the product page — you can omit it and just pass quantity.

examples.title: After getProduct — already on product page

getCheckoutLink.description: Navigate to checkout and return the checkout URL. Cart should have items.

returns.checkoutUrl: Full URL of the checkout page
